text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Today marks the first day of summer camp. To make the most of our
time, I've gone ahead and started Daiwa Scarlet on beach runs.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Pant, pant, pant... Haaah, aaagh... I'm sweating buckets...

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Let me take a quick breather! Sigh... Running on sand really tires you out.
choice_data_list:
But it'll also build up your muscles that much
more.

But it'll also build up your muscles that much
more.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
If it didn't, I'd have some choice words for you. I'm not trying to waste
all my energy for no reason, you know.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
If anything, I welcome a hurdle or two. Each obstacle I overcome is
another step closer to being number one.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Okay, I'm done resting! Let's get back to it.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She's caught her breath, but I can tell her balance is a little wobbly.
Looks like her legs are shaky, and I doubt this heat is doing her any
favors either.
choice_data_list: Let's call it here for today.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Huh? Were you even listening to me just now?

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
I said I welcome challenges! We're at summer camp, so isn't a tougher
schedule par for the course?

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
If I complained about every little thing, there's no way I could
become number one!
choice_data_list: Even so, you shouldn't overwork yourself.
Even so, you shouldn't overwork yourself.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: I don't need you to tell me tha—aah?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Scarlet tries to take a step forward, but her legs give way beneath
her.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Tch... I can't become number one if I get exhausted this easily. I have
to do m—
choice_data_list: Resting is also an essential part of training.
Resting is also an essential part of training.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Sigh. Fine, you win. I'll rest a bit more, and then—
choice_data_list: We still got camp tomorrow too, you know?
We still got camp tomorrow too, you know?

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Fine, fine. I'll listen to you this time.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
I mean, you are my trainer and all. And I can't stand you worrying
about me.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Geez. As soon as I'm back up to snuff, we're making up for lost
ground.
choice_data_list: I better not find you sneaking out to run, okay?
I better not find you sneaking out to run, okay?

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Excuse me. I'm not a child, so could you not treat me like one?

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
If we're done training, then I'm free for the rest of the day, right? See
you.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: With a slight wobble in her gait, she starts heading back to the dorm.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Later in the evening, I decide to go check up on Scarlet. In the dorm
hallway, an unfamiliar student comes up to me.

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text: Oh hey, you're Scarlet's trainer. Are you looking for her?

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text:
I don't think she's in her room. I just saw her heading towards the
entrance.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She was pretty beat after today's training... Is she going to be okay
walking around by herself?

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Oh, if it isn't my trainer? What's that look on your face for?

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: I was about to go for a walk an—
choice_data_list: I'm coming too!
I'm coming too!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: I-I don't mind... But, what're you getting so worked up for?

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Don't tell me—you're worried I'll sneak in some training again...
choice_data_list:
You were a little unsteady this afternoon, so I
just want to be sure.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Ah, so that's why. Don't worry, I took a relaxing bath followed by a
nice nap.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Like you said, we have training tomorrow too. I wouldn't want to
overdo it today and feel dead tomorrow.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
But I've got to say... You really are a worrywart. You know, at first I
thought you just didn't trust me.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
How about this? I'll prove to you that I'm full of energy and feeling
perfectly fine!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Daiwa Scarlet insists on leading the way, so I follow along beside
her—when suddenly—lively festival music starts playing nearby...

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
I heard there was a festival going on nearby, so I was just about to go
and check it out. Hey, don't all these delicious smells make you
hungry?
choice_data_list: Looks like your appetite's just fine, too.
Looks like your appetite's just fine, too.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Of course it is! A happy stomach is key to a happy me.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Come on, let's go buy out the food stalls! Oh, but before that—let's
have some fun!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After taking in the festival, we load up on food and head to the
beach. Yakisoba, takoyaki, shaved ice, cotton candy—we devour
them one after the other.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Mmm, that hit the spot! Yum, yum! ♪
choice_data_list: I'm glad you're having a good time.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Hey, didn't I tell you earlier? Stop being such a worrywart already.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Okay, I did overwork myself that one time, but now I'm not alone,
so...

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: A-anyways that's how it is, so I'm fine now! Got it?!
choice_data_list: Thanks for counting on me.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: I didn't say it was you I was talking about, did I?!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
It's just, you are a pro trainer... So I thought it'd be okay to leave the
training stuff to you, nothing else.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
B-basically, you better take responsibility for what you promised!
You're the one who said, "Let's become number one together."
choice_data_list: Just leave it to me!
Just leave it to me!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: And there you go, getting all carried away.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
I'll be way more prepared for tomorrow's training, so you better not
fall behind either!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: I will become number one—but I can't do it alone.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
That's why... you need to keep up with me and become the number
one trainer too!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The next day, Daiwa Scarlet runs with a newfound resolve beneath
the shining sun, more dazzling than even the distant horizon.
